free_text: -INTERACTIONS OF SLOW NEUTRONS WITH CHROMIUM ISOTOPES-.
.POWDER MIXED WITH LIQUIDS FOR CHRISTIANSEN FILTER.
CRYSTALLINE CHROMIUM FOR TOTAL AND ABSORPTION
DENSITY OF A POWDERED SAMPLE WITH THAT OF A RANGE
OF LIQUID MIXTURES OF VARIED BUT WELL KNOWN
SCATTERING DENSITY. FOR COHERENT SCATTERING LENGTHS.
NEUTRON TRANSMISSION WAS MEASURED AS A FUNCTION
OF THE DISTANCE BETWEEN SAMPLE AND DETECTOR,AND
THE TOTAL AND ABSORPTION CROSS SECTIONS DEDUCED
FROM THE FORM OF THE MEASURED DEPENDENCE.
RESONANCE DETECTORS OF RHODIUM AND SILVER. FOR
VARIOUS LIQUIDS IN CHRISTIANSEN FILTER. FOR
.UNCERTAINTY DUE TO INHOMOGENEITY AND TRACE IMPURITIES
ARE INCLUDED. ALL ERRORS ARE QUOTED AS ONE STANDARD
INCOHERENT SCATTERING CROSS SECTION. BOUND ATOM.
DERIVED FROM THE DIFFERENCE BETWEEN THE
TOTAL FREE CROSS SECTION AND 4*PI*A(N)**2, THE
CROSS SECTION EQUIVALENT OF THE COHERENT SCATTERING
DERIVED FROM TOTAL CROSS SECTION LESS
.AVERAGE OF FIVE INDEPENDENT MEASUREMENTS IS GIVEN.
.MEAN CORRECTION FOR H2 AND O2 CONTAMINATION
AMPLITUDE AND SPIN INCOHERENT CROSS SECTION OF
NATURAL COMPOSITION. ONLY CR-53 IS NOT SPIN ZERO.
AMPLITUDE EQUIVALENT PLUS DERIVED SPIN INCOHERENT
